name: Temperature
description: Single-purpose temperature sensors: probes, immersion/surface/contact thermometers, and cold-chain or grain/silo temperature monitors. Distinct from `climate`, which also reports humidity.
notes: temperature is °C. Use this only for standalone temperature devices; a sensor that also reports humidity is `climate` (air.temperature + air.relativeHumidity), and soil/water/leaf probes use those groups.
